Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Production Of Documents In Response To Second Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
George Bishop for plaintiff and moving party: Steve Higgins
James Kemp for defendant and opposing party: Higgins Group Holdings LLC

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Steve Higgins' motion to compel production of documents (set #2) is granted. The Court has read and considered the late-filed declaration in opposition to the motion. The objections, having been waived, are ordered stricken. Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses and to produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that defendants failed to respond in a timely manner and opposed the motion without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $3,160 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Attendance And Testmony At Deposition And Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
George Bishop for plaintiff and moving party: Steve Higgins
James Kemp for defendant and opposing party: Higgins Group Holdings LLC

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Steve Higgins' motion to compel the attendance at deposition and production of documents is granted. The Court has read and considered the late-filed declaration in opposition to the motion. Defendant is ordered to appear and produce documents at a time mutually convenient to the parties. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
